transcription.text: Want a sleek that stays up to five washes? It's possible. Garnier presents Ferti Sleek and Stay Serum. Patented water resistant technology to block out frizz. For ultra glassy sleek that stays up to five washes. Ferti Sleek and Stay System by Garnier.
